summary: Good soundboard recording with a funky first set highlighted by the Esau/Estimated Prophet vibe.
review: The tape delivers solid, clear sound quality that fans appreciate, thanks to Tim’s work on the board. The first set is praised for its groove, especially the “funky Esau” moment, making this an enjoyable listen despite limited detail on the rest of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic 4‑star review praises both sound and performance; a second empty review adds no useful data, so rating leans positive but remains moderate due to limited input.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes "Good sound" and compliments Tim’s work; no mention of drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as nice and funky, indicating a smooth, engaging opening half.
